design_philosophy: A highly professional, trustworthy B2B SaaS registration experience tailored for the Turkish travel market. Employs a split-screen layout (Dark Navy left pane, pure white right pane) to balance emotional trust-building with frictionless data entry. Generous padding and crisp typography project a premium, 'Metro Travel' brand identity.

layout_and_spacing.left_pane: bg-[#0d1a30] relative hidden lg:flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden text-white
layout_and_spacing.right_pane: bg-white flex items-center justify-center p-6 md:p-12 lg:p-24 overflow-y-auto

components.button_primary: bg-[#f97316] hover:bg-[#ea580c] text-white font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-md transition-colors w-full sm:w-auto
components.button_secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-md transition-colors
components.input_field: w-full border border-slate-200 rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-slate-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#f97316]/50 focus:border-[#f97316] transition-all bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white
components.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm

left_pane_content.title: Türkiye'nin Lider B2B Turizm Ağına Katılın
left_pane_content.subtitle: Binlerce otel, transfer ve tur seçeneğiyle acentanızın gücüne güç katın.

left_pane_content.title: Tesisinizi Milyonlarca Gezgine Açın
left_pane_content.subtitle: Metro Travel güvencesiyle doluluk oranlarınızı artırın, global pazara doğrudan ulaşın.

steps: Temel Bilgiler (Property name, type, star rating)

images.description: Business professionals meeting, representing B2B agency trust.
Luxurious Turkish resort in Antalya, representing premium hotel properties.
Cappadocia hot air balloons, alternate abstract background for travel vibe.

testing.data_testid_requirement: All inputs, buttons, and step indicators MUST include descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., 'agency-name-input', 'hotel-step-2-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI focusing on a highly polished B2B split-screen layout. Left side must be visually striking with the dark navy (#0d1a30) overlay and background image. Right side must be a clean, spacious white form.
Use lucide-react for all icons (checkmarks, location, stars, building, etc.).
Implement a clear multi-step form progression for the Hotel Registration page using Shadcn components or custom state with progress bars.
Ensure the Turkish text provided in left_pane_content is used accurately to set the professional tone.
Use 'Outfit' font for all headings, ensuring tight tracking. Use system sans-serif for body text. Load Outfit from Google Fonts.
Ensure focus states on inputs are highly visible using the Metro Orange (#f97316) color.
Include simple form validation visual clues for a realistic SaaS feel.
